provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall reptilian alien Veshan warrior wearing a Compact-style steel-blue pressed fabric uniform with machine-made rectangular patches and stamped metal buttons, regulation trousers designed for human legs not digitigrade joints, human shoes that do not accommodate clawed feet, a human-style belt with a human holster, the entire outfit was designed for a human body and fights against every aspect of Veshan anatomy and culture
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan in Compact-style pressed uniform designed for human body. Fights against scale ridges and digitigrade legs. Wrong material vocabulary for species.
